description: SPDX is an open standard for representing software package, licensing, provenance, security, and related bill-of-materials information. The spdx.org site publishes the SPDX License List and links to broader project information and tools.
summary: spdx.org exposes a public SPDX License List website on https://spdx.org/licenses with individual license pages and no developer-authenticated API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI documented on spdx.org itself.
